name: Summer Veggie Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 1 medium green pepper, cut into chunks
1 medium yellow pepper, cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large shallow baking dish, combine all ingredients.
2. Cover and refrigerate, turning occasionally, for 4 hours or overnight.
3. Remove the vegetables, reserving the marinade.
4. On skewers, alternately thread the vegetables.
5. Grill, turning and basting frequently until cooked through.
